## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore / build / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
